# TAR(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  tar — tape archiver

## SYNOPSIS
  tar [options] [archive] [files...]

## DESCRIPTION
Creates, extracts, and lists archive files. Supports gzip compression.

## OPTIONS
  -c  create archive
  -x  extract archive
  -t  list archive contents
  -z  use gzip compression
  -f  specify archive filename
  -v  verbose output

## EXAMPLES
  tar -czf logs.tar.gz /var/log/
  tar -xzf archive.tar.gz
  tar -tzf archive.tar.gz

## SEE ALSO
  gzip, zip, unzip
